objective: Teach MedGemma to visually identify and understand Cendol dessert across its forms, ingredients, textures, regional context, and culinary uses in Southeast Asia.

hero_product: photorealistic bowl of cendol dessert with green pandan rice flour jelly strands, shaved ice, sweetened coconut milk, and dark gula melaka syrup
close-up photorealistic image of cendol dessert showing extruded green pandan jelly noodles with coconut milk and palm sugar syrup
traditional Penang cendol dessert bowl with shaved ice, green pandan jelly, coconut milk, and gula melaka syrup in hawker centre setting
macro_texture: close-up photorealistic texture of pandan rice flour jelly noodles (cendol) extruded through sieve, showing worm-like green strands
detailed photorealistic image of shaved ice crystals topped with creamy sweetened coconut milk in cendol dessert
macro shot of dark treacly gula melaka (palm sugar syrup) drizzled over shaved ice and pandan jelly in cendol
raw_ingredients_and_process: photorealistic pandan leaves and pandan juice used for coloring cendol jelly noodles
extrusion process of pandan rice flour jelly noodles through sieve to form green cendol strands
ingredients layout: pandan rice flour, full-fat coconut milk, gula melaka palm sugar syrup, shaved ice, optional red azuki beans and jackfruit slices
in_the_wild_context: cendol dessert served at a Malay hawker centre stall in Penang, Malaysia with local signage
photorealistic bowl of cendol on a rustic wooden table at a Bazaar Ramadan food market in Southeast Asia
cendol dessert served as an afternoon refreshment in traditional Singapore Malay cuisine setting
culinary_application: cendol dessert served in a clear bowl showing layered shaved ice, pandan jelly, coconut milk, and gula melaka syrup
variation of cendol with added red azuki beans and jackfruit slices as toppings
street food vendor preparing and assembling cendol dessert with shaved ice, pandan jelly, coconut milk, and palm sugar syrup
optional_local_language_queries: 煎蕊 dessert bowl with pandan jelly, coconut milk and gula melaka syrup
சென்டோல் traditional Tamil pandan jelly shaved ice dessert
Es Cendol or Dawet Indonesian style shaved ice dessert with coconut milk and palm sugar syrup
